mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vocabulary_library_words (topic_id, word, word_type, meaning_vi, example_en, ipa, audio_storage_key) VALUES (#{topicId}, #{word}, #{wordType}, #{meaningVi}, #{exampleEn}, #{ipa}, #{audioStorageKey})
mapper.select: SELECT id, topic_id, word, word_type, meaning_vi, example_en, ipa, audio_storage_key, created_at FROM vocabulary_library_words WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, topic_id, word, word_type, meaning_vi, example_en, ipa, audio_storage_key, created_at FROM vocabulary_library_words WHERE topic_id = #{topicId} ORDER BY word
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vocabulary_library_words WHERE topic_id = #{topicId}
SELECT word FROM vocabulary_library_words WHERE topic_id = #{topicId}

SELECT w.id, w.topic_id, w.word, w.word_type, w.meaning_vi, w.example_en, w.ipa, w.audio_storage_key, w.created_at FROM vocabulary_library_words w LEFT JOIN vocabulary_weak_points wp ON wp.user_id = #{userId} AND wp.item_id = 'vocab:' || lower(w.word) WHERE w.topic_id = #{topicId} AND (wp.mastery_level IS NULL OR wp.mastery_level < 0.7) ORDER BY random() LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE vocabulary_library_words SET audio_storage_key = #{audioStorageKey} WHERE id = #{id}
